utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five keys. Now check if each is fully specified with details and costs:
- health_coverage: Includes description and monthly_cost (445) and notes. It specifies physical and mental health insurance and add-ons with costs. Meets requirement.
- property_coverage: Has description and monthly_cost (100). Meets home/contents with costs; description implies home coverage; costs present.
- travel_coverage: Has description and monthly_cost (265) and notes including additional service cost. Meets requirement.
- additional_services: Has description and monthly_cost (20). Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Provides monthly_total (830) and notes. Provides complete monthly cost breakdown at least as total; acceptable.
All items are present with costs and sufficient detail.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan includes: HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical) and LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental) from primary_health_coverage; Preventive Care Package add-on and an Advanced Cardiac Monitoring add-on (the latter is not listed in ground-truth, so it cannot be mapped); HomeFirst Standard Coverage with Smart Home Integration add-on (Smart Home Integration is in property_enhancement_services, but the plan lists it as an add-on to coverage; we map HomeFirst Standard Coverage only since add-ons outside the item list aren't rated as combined items); PrimeTravel Premium Plan and 24/7 Travel Assistance (the latter exists under travel_enhancement_services). Premium Insurance Membership exists under general_services. Therefore, map: HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical health rating 7), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health rating 8), Preventive Care Package (rating 8), HomeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 7), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 10), 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 9), Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10).
